hero.title: About CBS IT Union
hero.subtitle: Meet the Community
hero.description: An interdisciplinary student organization connecting Data Science, Digital Business, and Information Systems students at Copenhagen Business School.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To foster collaboration and innovation by connecting students across disciplines, enabling knowledge sharing, and creating opportunities for professional growth in the evolving tech landscape.

content.title: Host Events
content.description: From workshops and talks to networking sessions and competitions, we create spaces for learning and connection.

content.title: Build Community
content.description: Connect students, faculty, and industry professionals around shared interests in technology and business.

content.title: Drive Innovation
content.description: Support student projects and initiatives that explore the intersection of business and technology.

cta.title: Join Us
cta.subtitle: Be part of a growing community of innovators and leaders.
